title: thymus zygis var. serpylloides
intro: Thymus zygis var. serpylloides, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus zygis plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Spanish thyme include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Spanish thyme can be consumed through various herbal preparations, such as tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to soothe the body and mind.
